What I Do

Services

01

3D Animation

End-to-end 3D production from modeling and texturing to lighting, rendering and compositing.

02

Music Videos

Creative music videos, lyric videos and audio-reactive visuals with stunning effects.

03

Product Ads

TVC, product films and social media ads optimized for engagement and conversion.

04

Kids Content

Educational animation for children. Storytelling, character design and app video production.

05

Project Management

Leading editor teams from concept to delivery. Timeline, quality control and coordination.

06

Product Management

Digital product development, roadmaps, stakeholder management and creative output at scale.

07

Motion Graphics

Explainer videos, infographics, logo reveals and kinetic typography for brands.

08

Color & Sound

Professional color grading with DaVinci Resolve and full sound design for complete AV experience.

About Me

Hi, I'm Doris Le

Creative Director at SentryX Group with a passion for turning bold ideas into visual experiences that leave lasting impressions.

With 2+ years leading creative teams across 3D animation, kids educational content, music video production and product advertising, I bridge the gap between creative vision and flawless execution.

From managing end-to-end production pipelines to directing animation teams across multiple projects simultaneously, I thrive at the intersection of creativity and leadership.

Let's create something extraordinary together.
